canonical_definition: The latent ability to understand and process multilingual text in which languages are switched or mixed within a single utterance or conversation.
papers: Constructions are Revealed in Word Distributions

definitions.text: The latent ability to understand and process multilingual text in which languages are switched or mixed within a single utterance or conversation.
definitions.paper: Constructions are Revealed in Word Distributions

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to understand and generate natural language that blends multiple languages within a single utterance, preserving grammatical coherence and semantic meaning.

characterization: The latent ability to understand and process multilingual text in which languages are switched or mixed within a single utterance or conversation.
